lines.text: Switching to channel two. [pause] Let's talk this over privately, gentlemen.
[flatly] We'll talk right here. Whole world's listening anyway.
All right. [pause] On the record, then. Who are you, and who sent you up here.
We're the backup crew. NASA never processed us out. [pause] We're still on the roster, son. This is our mission.
[excited] Where did you even COME from?
This here's our camp. [pause] Pack the fuck off.
(into radio) [deliberate] That's the colors, son. You'll stop right there.
(into radio) Harmony copies. Control, Harmony requests instructions.
